text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch Silence Suzuka standing around the
practice track alone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why? My legs just won't keep up with me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I shouldn't dawdle while at practice.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, well... It's difficult to explain.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Running just doesn't feel good right now. My legs
feel so heavy...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand why this is happening. It's not
like I'm sick or hurt or anything...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka lets out a sigh and stares blankly
at the track ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I've worked her too hard. I should
probably adjust her schedule so that running
starts feeling enjoyable for her again.
